OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, September 01, 2011:
Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. with Charles Byrd, property manager/representative for plaintiff Community Housing Partnership
Zachary A. Toran, limited scope attorney appearing with defendant Janice Knight

Settlement conference held. Case settles with the parties entering into a signed agreement which is not filed with the court this day. The September 6, 2011 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (514)
